title: vitex microphylla
intro: Vitex microphylla, also known as the dwarf chaste tree or small vitex, is a flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Vitex microphylla include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and stress, as well as its potential to regulate hormonal imbalances and improve sleep quality. Vitex microphylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support women's health and well-being.
